subject: Meeting Notes: Finance Sync 8/12
content:
Hi Irene,

I had a call with DataFlow Systems today about the Analytics Pipeline
integration. Key takeaways:

- They can deliver the testing phase by 11/11, which is 2 weeks behind our
schedule
- Pricing: $352K for the base package + $76K for Security Hardening add-on
- They require a 3-year commitment minimum
- Technical contact will be Olivia Davis (Product Manager)

For comparison, DataFlow Systems quoted $359K with a more flexible contract.

Should we bring this to the Board Meeting for a final decision?

Best,
Tina
--
Tina Taylor
Architect | Starkindustries
+1-989-809-1066

subject: Re: Meeting Notes: Finance Sync 8/12
content:
All,    

Following up from the Quarterly Review earlier today. Here are the action items:

- @Grace: Finalize the spec by Wednesday (target: 5/17)
- @Olivia: Schedule the Observability Stack review with Support
- @Tina: Update the Payment Gateway configuration per our discussion
- @Irene: Send out the revised Project Horizon timeline by EOW

Next meeting: Tuesday at 11:30. Calendar invite to follow.

Thanks everyone,  
Irene

subject: Re: Meeting Notes: Finance Sync 8/12
content:
Hi David,

I had a call with Pinnacle Analytics today about the Search Index
integration.
Key takeaways:

- They can deliver the alpha phase by 12/16, which is 5 weeks ahead of
our
schedule
- Pricing: $212K for the base package + $84K for AWS Cost Optimization
add-on
- They require a 1-year commitment minimum
- Technical contact will be Priya Clark (Director of Engineering)

For comparison, Pinnacle Analytics quoted $255K with a more flexible
contract.

Should we bring this to the Roadmap Sync for a final decision?

Best,
Irene

subject: Re: Meeting Notes: Finance Sync 8/12
content:
Hi all,

Thanks for a productive Hackathon today. Here's a summary of what we decided:

DECISIONS:
- We will proceed with Option A for the Legacy CRM migration (projected savings:
$49K/yr)
- Neptune launch date moved to Q2 (from original Q3 target)
- Engineering team will own the Incident Response workstream going forward

OPEN QUESTIONS:
- How does this affect the StreamLine Solutions contract timeline? (Irene to
investigate)
- Do we need additional headcount for UX Designer? (Leo to assess)

Full notes: https://confluence.internal/58af20e38219

Regards,
Fatima
---
Fatima Lee | DevOps Engineer
Lexcorp
